etymology: Nicole = victory of the people; Thibodeaux = bold people
wordplay_note: Victory of the bold people — but she is a simulacrum herself
card_description: Nicole Thibodeaux (meaning "Nicole = victory of the people; Thibodeaux = bold people") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. The First Lady and apparent ruler of the USEA who is revealed to be an android. Name note: Victory of the bold people — but she is a simulacrum herself. Government as literal simulation — the ruler is a manufactured image. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: The First Lady and apparent ruler of the USEA who is revealed to be an android
reference.etymology: Nicole = victory of the people; Thibodeaux = bold people
reference.significance: Government as literal simulation — the ruler is a manufactured image
